column5: # Required | Three-letter IATA code for origin airport.
column6: # Required | Three-letter IATA code for destination airport.
column7: # Optional | A short; relevant description of the flight. Include specific or unique details. Use plain text and don't enter text in all capital letters. Character limit: 5;000.
column9: # Optional | The URL for a video of your product. Link should be a videos file on a file hosting website; not a video player. Videos must be in a supported format (.3g2; .3gp; .3gpp; .asf; .avi; .dat; .divx; .dv; .f4v; .flv; .gif; .m2ts; .m4v; .mkv; .mod; .mov; .mp4; .mpe; .mpeg; .mpeg4; .mpg; .mts; .nsv; .ogm; .ogv; .qt; .tod; .ts; .vob or .wmv).
column10: # Optional | The URL for a video of your product. Link should be a videos file on a file hosting website; not a video player. column11: # Optional | The URL of the specific page where people can view the flight.
column12: # Optional | The cost and currency of a one way flight. The price is a number followed by the 3-digit currency code (ISO 4217 standards). Use a period (".") as the decimal point.
column13: # Optional | Used by advertisers to mark priority of flight. Can be used to create product set of distressed flights
column41: # Optional | Add labels to products to help filter them into product sets. Max characters: 110 per label; 5000 labels per product
